16407696.title: List of Advanced Dungeons & Dragons 2nd edition monsters

pageprops.defaultsort: Advanced Dungeons and Dragons 2nd Edition Monsters
pageprops.displaytitle: List of Advanced Dungeons & Dragons 2nd edition monsters

16407696.extract: Monsters are an important element of Advanced Dungeons & Dragons 2nd-edition, a role-playing game. The ones listed here are only those from official Advanced Dungeons & Dragons 2nd Edition supplements published by TSR, Inc. or Wizards of the Coast, not licensed or unlicensed third-party products such as video games or unlicensed Advanced Dungeons & Dragons 2nd Edition manuals.
